input: Run discovery handover on this project
expected_behavior: Skill activates and produces the expected discovery handover output following the defined process
Skill recognizes the trigger phrase and executes the discovery handover workflow

input: Apply discovery handover to analyze the current codebase with detailed output
expected_behavior: Skill produces comprehensive discovery handover analysis with evidence-tagged findings

input: What is the weather forecast for tomorrow?
expected_behavior: Skill should NOT activate — this input has no relation to discovery handover
